creator: arved@FreeBSD.org
text:
-------- Original Message --------
Subject: 	Re: ports/158892: [PATCH] textproc/rubygem-augeas: update to 0.4.1
Date: 	Mon, 18 Jul 2011 15:42:47 +0800
From: 	Daniel Lin <linpct@gmail.com>
To: 	arved@freebsd.org
CC: 	freebsd-ports-bugs@freebsd.org



Hi, arved,

    Please reject this PR first, I think it needs other patch or need
upgrade new version of textproc/augeas.
    Thanks and sorry for wasting your time.

On Sun, Jul 17, 2011 at 9:58 PM, <arved@freebsd.org
<mailto:arved@freebsd.org>> wrote:

    Synopsis: [PATCH] textproc/rubygem-augeas: update to 0.4.1

    State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
    State-Changed-By: arved
    State-Changed-When: Sun Jul 17 13:57:43 UTC 2011
    State-Changed-Why:
    I get the following error:

    ===>  Checking if textproc/rubygem-augeas already installed
    /usr/bin/env  /usr/local/bin/gem18 install -l --no-update-sources
    --no-ri --install-dir /usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/1.8
    /usr/ports/distfiles/rubygem/ruby-augeas-0.4.1.gem -- --build-args
    Building native extensions.  This could take a while...
    ERROR:  Error installing
    /usr/ports/distfiles/rubygem/ruby-augeas-0.4.1.gem:
           ERROR: Failed to build gem native extension.

           /usr/local/bin/ruby18 extconf.rb --build-args
    creating Makefile

    make
    cc -I. -I/usr/local/lib/ruby/1.8/amd64-freebsd8
    -I/usr/local/lib/ruby/1.8/amd64-freebsd8 -I. -I/usr/include    -fPIC
    -I/usr/include -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing  -fPIC
     -I/usr/local/include -c _augeas.c
    _augeas.c: In function 'Init__augeas':
    _augeas.c:402: error: 'AUG_ENABLE_SPAN' undeclared (first use in
    this function)
    _augeas.c:402: error: (Each undeclared identifier is reported only once
    _augeas.c:402: error: for each function it appears in.)

    Can you investigate?

    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=158892




-- 
Daniel Lin (pct)
